results.title: Lucknow Metro Phase-1B: Medical College station to take over half of the corridor’s land requirement
219 'Penny Stocks' Face Delisting Risk, 8% of Korea's Listed Firms
results.description: 219 penny stocks, or 8% of Korea's listed companies, face delisting risk as a new KRX rule takes effect next month targeting shares trading below 1,000 won.

results.title: Trump Accepts $400 Million Qatari Jet Amid 'Corruption' Outcry, Signals China Visit
results.description: President Trump accepted a $400 million Qatari jet as a new Air Force One amid corruption accusations from Democrats, while signaling a visit to China for the November APEC summit in Shenzhen.
